# ElicitationForm.BuildUrlAcceptResult method

Builds a URL-mode `accept`[`ElicitResult`](../ElicitResult.md) — consent to the out-of-band interaction, carrying NO `content` (spec §20.5, R-20.5-b).

public static ElicitResult BuildUrlAcceptResult()
